underlying_goal: Review PRs, address review comments, fix UI styling issues on login page, and create a revert PR as a safety net
friction_detail: Initial CSS fix using vite_stylesheet_tag didn't work because CSS was bundled inside JS entrypoint, requiring a different approach with theme classes.
brief_summary: User needed PR reviews, PR comment fixes pushed, login page UI styling matched to production, and a revert PR created — all accomplished successfully.
